studyName: Human Blastocyst 10X Single Cell RNA Sequencing

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: GROWN_ON_FIBRONECTIN
variables.description: Whether embryos were grown on fibronectin coated plates

variables.name: GROWN_ON_STROMAL_CELLS
variables.description: Whether embryos were grown on stromal cells

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: NUMBER_OF_EMBRYOS_POOLED
variables.description: Number of embryos pooled in each sample

variables.name: NUMBER_OF_SUBJECTS
variables.description: Number of subjects contributed to each sample

variables.name: POOLED_WITH_BLASTOID
variables.description: Whether embryo cells were pooled with blastoid cells

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: POOLING
variables.description: Individual subjects included in the pool

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: DONOR_OOCYTE
variables.description: Whether donor oocytes are used to generate the embryos

variables.name: MATERNAL_AGE
variables.description: The maternal age of the IVF patient or the oocyte donor

variables.name: NUMBER_OF_EMBRYOS_COLLECTED
variables.description: Number of embryos collected from the subject

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.description: Sample ID
